title: Bone-Mealable Nether Wart
description: This data pack allows you to bone meal Nether Wart.
body:
# What is this?
This data pack allows you to **bone meal Nether Wart** just like any other crop. Before you had to wait for the Nether Wart to mature, which can take some time. By bone mealing it, you can get Nether Wart quicker.

Nether Wart has only four growth stages. Therefore, with each interaction, there is a `68%` **chance** that the Nether Wart will proceed to its next growth stage. This is designed to prevent the process from being excessive.

## Unloading the Data Pack
You can run the command `/function bonemealablenetherwart:.api/unload` to unload the data pack.
The command will automatically remove any scoreboards, entities and other contents loaded by the data pack.

## Version Compatibility
The newest version of the data pack; `v1.0.0` is supported by Minecraft versions `1.21.2`-`1.21.4`.
In data pack format – `57`-`61`.
